## Summary

Please describe the change and the motivation behind it.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test/CI update

## Validation

Describe how this was tested.

- [ ] `./gradlew test`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Manual test on device/emulator

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I kept the change focused and minimal
- [ ] I added/updated tests when needed
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
